title: phacelia insularis var. insularis
intro: Phacelia insularis var. insularis, also known as island phacelia, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant native to the Channel Islands of California. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Phacelia insularis var. insularis include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy in traditional folk medicine.
